description.ko: 영원한 황혼과 네온 불빛에 젖어든 거대 도시. 홀로그램 광고와 흩날리는 빗줄기 아래 첨단 기술과 도시의 쇠락이 공존하는 사이버펑크 세계관을 담고 있습니다.
description.en: A sprawling metropolis bathed in eternal twilight and neon brilliance, where advanced technology and urban decay coexist under a canopy of holographic advertisements and shimmering rain.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a futuristic cyberpunk megacity, dense urban landscape with towering skyscrapers, glowing neon signs in cyan and electric purple, rain-slicked asphalt streets reflecting city lights, flying vehicles weaving through sky-bridges, volumetric fog and hazy atmosphere, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic.
